final:
module RefModule (
    input wire D,
    input wire E,
    output reg Q,
    output reg Qn
);

reg unused_master;

always @(D or E) begin
    if (E) begin
        unused_master = D; // Capture D when E is high
    end
end

always @(unused_master or E) begin
    if (!E) begin
        Q = unused_master;  // Output Q follows unused_master when E is low
        Qn = ~unused_master; // Output Qn is the complement of unused_master
    end
end

endmodule
